title: dalea scandens var. vulneraria
intro: Dalea scandens var. vulneraria, also known as Fragrant Prickly Pear or Prickly Moses, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, cuts, and other skin irritations. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Dalea scandens var. vulneraria can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions, or taken internally to promote overall well-being.
